title: ExternalAssetPackage
description: Schema for .meta.json files describing an external asset package (source file + import settings + derived sub-assets).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Strings (e.g. '1.0.0') for hand-authored .meta.json; integers (1, 2, ...) for importer-emitted .meta.json (forgeax-engine-remote-asset import writes schemaVersion: 1 as the wire format SSOT, GltfMetaJson literal type).

kind.description: Discriminator for the external asset package type.

importer.description: Open importer key (feat-20260603-asset-import-loader-injection M2): the @forgeax/engine-import runner dispatches the sidecar to the Importer registered under this key. Replaces the former closed `assetType` enum (one-cut migration, no shim). Known keys: 'image' (engine-image importer, single-image source), 'gltf' (engine-gltf importer, .gltf/.glb source), 'audio' (engine-audio-webaudio import path), 'font' (engine-font bake path), and the reserved 'shader' key consumed by engine-vite-plugin-shader's orthogonal transform pipeline (the import runner explicitly skips it). Adding a new importer needs only a registered Importer under a new key - no schema enum edit. Orthogonal to subAssets[].kind which identifies per-sub-asset payload kind.

source.description: Optional. Omit to derive the companion file in the same directory (strip .meta.json suffix from the meta filename). Or write @<name>/<rest> to reference a declared path table entry (see package.json#forgeax.assets.paths). Existing relative paths remain unchanged.

importSettings.description: Importer-specific settings. Free-form object. Common texture keys: compressionMode ('auto' | 'etc1s' | 'uastc' | 'none', default 'auto'; see @forgeax/engine-image README), mipmap (boolean, bake mip chain offline).

paramSchema.description: Material-shader parameter schema (feat-20260528-material-shader-registration-unification). Only valid when importer is 'shader'. Each entry has name (string) and type (string) with an optional default.

subAssets.description: Derived sub-assets extracted from the source file.

guid.description: RFC 4122 36-char dash-form UUID identifying this sub-asset.

sourceIndex.description: Zero-based index into the source file's exported objects.

name.description: Optional display-friendly name for this sub-asset. Copied from the source (e.g. glTF image.name / mesh.name) so the sidecar is human-inspectable. Has no runtime semantic weight.

kind.description: Open sub-asset kind string (feat-20260629-importer-self-declared-fold-contract M3 / D-1 scheme A): the prior closed enum is removed — any non-empty string is accepted at the schema layer. Known engine-owned kinds: mesh, material, scene, texture, equirect, material-shader, skeleton, skin, animation-clip, audio, font. Host-defined importers declare their own kind values (e.g. 'reel-game-blob') and the schema layer admits them without modification. Validation of unknown kinds is deferred to the fold/import layer where the ImporterRegistry is available. The field itself (subAssets[].kind) is retained (OOS-2: no field deletion, only enum removal).
